description_long: This object is a robust, rectangular bollard system featuring a dark, boxy base with five vertically oriented metallic posts extending from the top. The base appears to be constructed from a heavy, matte-finished material, likely metal or reinforced concrete, and is divided into two main sections of differing heights. The taller section supports the five cylindrical posts, which have a weathered, galvanized steel appearance. A small protruding tab or pedal is visible near the bottom on one side, possibly for operational or maintenance purposes. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, suitable for controlling vehicle or pedestrian access in urban environments.
description: A sturdy, rectangular bollard with five vertical metal posts on a dark, boxy base, featuring a small side tab and a modern, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the two-tiered base and a single metal post, with a small tab protruding from the lower section.
description_view_1: Front view displaying all five vertical metal posts evenly spaced atop the rectangular base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the taller section and a single post visible, but the tab is less prominent.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the base, the five posts, and the small tab or pedal at the bottom center.
